auth_notes: Authentication is typically handled via an API Key passed in the HTTP Header (e.g., 'Authorization: ReporterKey [YOUR_KEY]') or as a query parameter depending on the specific ReportingCloud/Reporting.io endpoint.
rate_limits: 100 requests per minute for standard tiers; higher limits available for enterprise plans.
gotchas: Generated reports are returned as binary data, requiring the n8n HTTP Request node to be set to 'Response Format: File' to prevent data corruption.
Template placeholders must strictly follow the service's merge field syntax (e.g., TX Text Control format), or the merge operation will fail silently.
Large document generation can exceed n8n's default node timeout settings if the dataset is substantial.
client_must_provide: Pre-formatted document templates (DOCX, RTF, or TX)
Sample JSON data structure for mapping merge fields
operations_available: Convert Document Format (e.g., DOCX to PDF)
research_notes: Integration requires the HTTP Request node. Users must handle the transition from JSON data to binary file output. It is recommended to use a 'Move Binary Data' node immediately after the request to name the file correctly before storage or transmission.

effort_recommendation.rationale: Integration requires the HTTP Request node. Users must handle the transition from JSON data to binary file output. It is recommended to use a 'Move Binary Data' node immediately after the request to name the file correctly before storage or transmission.
